data.title: Tesla Chair Estimates New Pay Plan For Elon Musk Could Cost $25B More. Now, Delaware Judge Has Rejected It For The 2nd Time: Here's What's Coming Next
data.description: Delaware judge rejects $56B pay package for Tesla CEO Elon Musk, deeming it void and influenced by Musk. Tesla plans to appeal, creating uncertainty.
